scripts.title: POV: You Just Entered Van Gogh's Mind
scripts.concept: Transform from boring gallery to mind-blowing immersion

shots.visual: Split screen: Left shows boring traditional museum with rope barriers and small paintings on white walls. Right shows massive Starry Night swirls projected floor-to-ceiling with people walking through glowing brushstrokes
shots.audio: Trending audio with dramatic beat drop building
shots.camera: Quick whip pan from left to right

shots.visual: Person silhouetted against massive sunflower field projection, golden petals swirling around them at 360 degrees, brushstrokes moving like living paint across every surface
Close-up of child's face illuminated by blue and yellow Starry Night swirls, eyes wide with wonder, then pull back to reveal entire family walking through the cosmic night sky projection
shots.camera: Push in on face, then dramatic pull back

shots.visual: Red countdown timer overlay on black screen showing 'FINAL WEEKS' with golden ticket stub graphic
shots.audio: Music hits final beat with urgency

music.style: Trending dramatic build with classical twist
music.build: Soft start → dramatic drop at 2s → building intensity → urgent finale
music.reference_track: Epic classical remix trending on TikTok

scripts.caption: POV: You thought you knew Van Gogh 🌌 This isn't a museum. This is stepping inside genius. FINAL WEEKS — link in bio 🎨 #VanGogh #ImmersiveArt #DateNight #NYC #ArtExperience #StarryNight #BucketList #FOMO

scripts.title: What If You Could Walk Through Starry Night?
scripts.concept: FOMO-driven experience showcase with real reactions

shots.visual: Black screen with elegant gold text, then dramatic reveal of person stepping through doorway into swirling blue and yellow cosmos of Starry Night
shots.text_overlay: WHAT IF YOU COULD WALK THROUGH STARRY NIGHT?

shots.visual: Aerial drone shot of massive sunflower field projection with dozens of people walking through golden petals, brushstrokes flowing like rivers of paint around their feet
Couple holding hands silhouetted against swirling Bedroom in Arles projection, intimate moment surrounded by Van Gogh's most personal space brought to life
Child reaching up to touch moving cypress tree branches projected on wall, paint strokes responding to their movement with interactive light
Instagram-style phone recording of friend taking selfie with Starry Night swirls, then wider shot showing the massive scale of the projection room
shots.text_overlay: YOUR FEED WILL NEVER BE THE SAME
shots.camera: Phone POV then pull back reveal

shots.visual: Quick montage of real visitor reactions: woman with hand over mouth in awe, man wiping tears, teenagers dancing in the light projections
Slow motion: Person walking through Café Terrace at Night, golden light washing over them, then spin to reveal they're surrounded by the complete 360-degree painting
Gold ticket animation with location details and countdown timer, ending on elegant logo with swirling brushstroke animation
shots.text_overlay: NOW OPEN • LIMITED RUN • BOOK NOW

music.build: Intimate piano → building strings → full orchestra climax → elegant resolution
music.reference_track: Hans Zimmer meets classical Van Gogh era

scripts.caption: What if you could step inside Van Gogh's mind? 🌌 Over 200 masterpieces projected at massive scale. Walk through Starry Night. Dance in sunflower fields. Experience art like never before. NOW OPEN — tickets selling fast. Link in bio. #ImagineVanGogh

scripts.title: The Mind of a Genius, Unlocked
scripts.concept: Movie trailer revealing Van Gogh's world as never-before-possible experience

shots.visual: Black screen with elegant typography: 'What if you could see the world through the eyes of genius?' Then dramatic reveal: extreme close-up of Van Gogh's actual brushstrokes from Starry Night, then pull back to reveal it's a massive wall projection
shots.text_overlay: WHAT IF YOU COULD SEE THE WORLD THROUGH THE EYES OF GENIUS?

shots.visual: Slow, atmospheric entry: Person's silhouette approaching massive doors, then stepping into cathedral-like space where Potato Eaters projection creates intimate, candlelit atmosphere around visitors
Time-lapse style: Sunflower field projection blooms from floor to ceiling around stationary visitors, golden petals swirling faster and faster, creating living painting environment

Multiple angles of Starry Night experience: overhead shot showing people walking through cosmic swirls, ground level showing brushstrokes flowing like rivers, close-up of child's face illuminated by moving stars
shots.audio: Full orchestral swell, emotional peak building

shots.visual: Emotional montage: Elderly woman touching wall where paint seems to flow under her hand, couple embracing surrounded by Bedroom in Arles, family lying on floor looking up at moving cypress trees

Spectacular wide shots: Café Terrace at Night wrapping 360 degrees around visitors, people dancing in Wheatfield with Cypresses as wind effects make the wheat appear to blow, groups sitting in Irises garden projection

Real testimonial moments: Woman saying 'I've never experienced anything like this,' man wiping tears, teenager posting to Instagram story, grandparent explaining painting to grandchild within the projection
Final montage building to crescendo: Quick cuts of most stunning moments, ending with lone figure standing in center of Starry Night cosmos, arms outstretched, completely immersed
shots.camera: Dynamic quick cuts to hero moment

shots.visual: Elegant logo animation with swirling brushstrokes, location details, and booking information over black background with subtle gold accents
shots.text_overlay: IMAGINE VAN GOGH • NOW OPEN • BOOK NOW
shots.audio: Orchestral resolution to single piano note

music.build: Mysterious opening → atmospheric build → emotional peaks → triumphant climax → elegant resolution

scripts.caption: What if you could step inside the mind of Van Gogh? Over 200 masterpieces. Massive scale. Complete immersion. This isn't a museum — this is experiencing genius. Now open for a limited run. Book your tickets now.
scripts.cta: Now open. Book tickets at link below.
